MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-586390 WITH CASE CGC-20-588197
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Veronika Zappelli, Esq. (415.761.8655; vjz@adcohen.com) of Law Offices of Adrienne D. Cohen for Defendants.
No other appearances.

Not argued. Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PRUDHVI JUMBARTHI and ISMAIL FARIDA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-586390 WITH CASE CGC-20-588197.

The unopposed motion to consolidate CGC-20-588197 and CGC-20-586390 (with the former as lead case) is granted. Any motion to continue and/or vacate a trial date must be filed in Department 206.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
